money_flow_summary: Money flows from consumers and businesses through utilities and energy retailers who sell electricity/gas, with a growing layer of distributed energy resources (solar, storage, EVs) creating new bidirectional flows. The AI opportunity is in optimization — grid intelligence, energy procurement arbitrage, and sustainability reporting automation — where data complexity is high but AI can extract significant value.

niches.name: Climate Risk Assessment for Real Estate

top_opportunities.title: ESG & Carbon Footprint Reporting Automation for SMBs
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that connects to a company's utility bills, travel expenses, supply chain invoices, and fleet data to automatically calculate Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions. Generates CDP, GRI, and TCFD-aligned reports. With SEC climate disclosure rules now in effect, mid-market companies face reporting requirements they can't afford to comply with manually. Charge $299-$1,499/mo. Big 4 consultants charge $50k-$200k for this work.
top_opportunities.moat: Multi-year emissions data creates comparison baseline that drives auditor trust; emissions factor database grows proprietary over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build utility bill PDF parser + emissions calculation engine using EPA emissions factors; create sample TCFD report; demo to 5 mid-market CFOs via LinkedIn
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads unstructured utility bills, travel receipts, and supplier invoices and maps them to emissions categories — a task that requires specialist consultants at $300/hr today

top_opportunities.title: Commercial Energy Procurement AI Agent
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Aggregate real-time wholesale electricity prices (EIA API), weather forecasts, and demand patterns for commercial facilities. AI recommends when to lock in fixed-rate contracts, when to buy spot, and how to structure load shifting to reduce demand charges. Charge $299-$999/mo to commercial real estate owners and manufacturers. A 20% reduction in energy costs for a facility spending $200k/yr is a $40k saving.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical energy usage data per facility creates personalized optimization; energy broker relationships create distribution
top_opportunities.first_step: Build EIA API + utility rate tariff parser; create demand charge analysis for 1 commercial building; present ROI case to 5 property managers
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI monitors 15-minute interval electricity prices and facility demand patterns to recommend exact load shifting windows — analysis that requires a dedicated energy engineer at $100k+/yr

top_opportunities.title: Solar Installation Proposal Automation Tool
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool for solar installers: enter a customer address, AI pulls satellite imagery, calculates rooftop area and orientation, estimates solar production using NREL PVWatts data, pulls local utility rates, and generates a professional proposal with ROI analysis and financing options. Charge solar companies $99-$299/mo. Every solar installer does 5-20 proposals per week; each currently takes 2-4 hours.
top_opportunities.moat: Local installer network creates referral distribution; NREL/satellite integration creates accuracy advantage
top_opportunities.first_step: Integrate NREL PVWatts API + Google Maps Solar API; build proposal PDF generator; demo to 5 local solar installers on LinkedIn
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates a personalized financial analysis ('Your system will pay off in 7.2 years and earn you $48,000 over 25 years at current utility rates') in seconds — a calculation that currently requires a specialist quote
